preToolUse.bash: export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && INPUT=$(cat) && TOOL_ARGS=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolArgs // empty') && if echo "$TOOL_ARGS" | grep -qE 'gh pr create|git checkout -b|git switch -c'; then gt tap guard pr-workflow || echo '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"PR workflow blocked by gt tap guard"}'; fi
